creator: miguel.morgan@gmail.com
text:
--0016e6407c640c15cf04965ae3e7 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-1 Any news on an update here? I'm trying to install ffmpeg, and so have to update my libGL which is failing with glxext.c:680: warning: implicit declaration of function 'XMissingExtension' gmake[2]: *** [glxext.o] Error 1 gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/graphics/libGL/work/Mesa-7.4.4/src/glx/x11' gmake[1]: *** [subdirs] Error 1 gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/graphics/libGL/work/Mesa-7.4.4/src' gmake: *** [default] Error 1 or glxext.c:662: warning: implicit declaration of function 'XMissingExtension' gmake[2]: *** [glxext.o] Error 1 gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/graphics/libGL/work/Mesa-7.6.1/src/glx/x11' gmake[1]: *** [subdirs] Error 1 gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/graphics/libGL/work/Mesa-7.6.1/src' gmake: *** [default] Error 1 depending on whether I try making libGL using WITHOUT-NOUVEAU=yes -- Mike --0016e6407c640c15cf04965ae3e7 Content-Type: text/html; charset=ISO-8859-1 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Any news on an update here?
